name: vp-plugins
description: Knowledge graph management and sprint workflow automation for Claude Code

plugins.name: vp-knowledge
plugins.description: Multi-ecosystem package research (npm, Rust, Go, PHP, Python, Ruby), developer tool research (Homebrew, GitHub Actions, Docker, VSCode), knowledge gap analysis, project context priming, session bookmarking, tag vocabulary sync, graph maintenance agents, and quality hooks for Basic Memory

plugins.name: vp-beads
plugins.description: Sprint workflow automation: backlog grooming, retrospectives, upstream vendor tracking, cross-project synergy tracking, swarm wave orchestration, and vendor sync for projects using beads and Basic Memory

plugins.name: vp-git
plugins.description: Git workflow safety skills: validation, verification, and repair for rebase, merge, and stacked PR workflows
